caption: The video depicts a medical simulation session, likely part of a training program called "Sim Week," as indicated by the text on the screen. Three individuals are seated in a room, all wearing masks and medical attire. The person on the left, dressed in a black jacket with a logo, appears to be reading from a piece of paper, possibly a script or patient information. The individual in the center, wearing blue scrubs, is holding a clipboard and seems to be observing or evaluating the situation. The person on the right, in pink scrubs, is gesturing with their hands, possibly explaining something or demonstrating a procedure. The setting suggests a collaborative learning environment where participants are practicing medical scenarios. The "Day 5" label implies this is part of a multi-day training event.
